label: CompTIA Network+ (Exam N10-009)
description: CompTIA Network+ (Exam N10-009) study notes course designed to help you build the foundational knowledge needed to securely establish, maintain, and troubleshoot modern networks. It covers core networking concepts, infrastructure, operations, security, cloud connectivity, SDN, automation, and zero-trust architecture, with practical exam prep across the topics you need to know for certification success.
